zh.lifeSummary: Georg Konrad Tresenriter是Conrad Tresenreuter和Anna Elisabetha的兒子，於1750年出生在德國貝也普法爾茲。他與Susannah Margaretha Jacobin在德國貝也藍德可萊斯 波薩波巴貝洛斯結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和4個女兒的父母。他去世於1831年在美國肯塔基州謝佛遜享年81歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Georg Konrad Tresenriter是Conrad Tresenreuter和Anna Elisabetha的儿子，于1750年出生在德国貝也普法爾茲。他与Susannah Margaretha Jacobin在德国貝也藍德可萊斯 波薩波巴貝洛斯结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和4个女儿的父母。他去世于1831年在美国肯塔基州謝佛遜享年81岁。

nameMeanings.name: Georg
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

variants.name: George
meanings: Via Old French and Latin, from Greek Georgios (a derivative of geōrgos ‘farmer’, from gē ‘earth’ + ergein ‘to work’). This was the name of several early saints, including the shadowy figure who is now the patron of England (as well as of Germany and Portugal). If the saint existed at all, he was perhaps martyred in Palestine in the persecutions of Christians instigated by the Emperor Diocletian at the beginning of the 4th century. The popular legend in which the hero slays a dragon is a medieval Italian invention. He was for a long time a more important saint in the Orthodox Church than in the West, and the name was not much used in England during the Middle Ages, even after St George came to be regarded as the patron of England in the 14th century. Its use increased from the 1400s, and by 1500 it was regularly among the most popular male names. This popularity was reinforced when George I came to the throne in 1714 , bringing this name with him from Germany. It has been one of the most popular English boys' names ever since.

historicEvents.description: Thomas Jefferson's American Declaration of Independence endorsed by Congress. Colonies declare independence.

historicEvents.title: Becomes the 15th State
historicEvents.description: On June 1, 1792, Kentucky became the 15th state. It was the first state west of the Appalachian Mountains

historicEvents.title: Creating the Eleventh Amendment
historicEvents.description: The Eleventh Amendment restricts the ability of any people to start a lawsuit against the states in federal court.

historicEvents.title: Wilderness Road Opens to Wagons
historicEvents.description: In 1796, the Wilderness Road opened up for wagon use. The route was used by colonial and early settlers to reach Kentucky from the East. It started in Virginia, and went southward to Tennessee and then went north to Kentucky. The main danger of this route was Native American attacks.
The Congress of Vienna established the German Confederation of 39 independent German states.

historicEvents.title: Jackson Purchase
historicEvents.description: The western part of Kentucky purchased by Andrew Jackson from the Chickasaw Indians in 1818. It became known as the Jackson Purchase. This included land that wasn't originally part of Kentucky when it became a state.

en.lifeSummary: Georg Konrad Tresenriter was born in 1750, in Palatinate, Bavaria, Germany as the son of Conrad Tresenreuter and Anna Elisabetha. He married Susannah Margaretha Jacobin in Barbelroth, Bergzabern, Bavaria, Germany. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 4 daughters. He died in 1831, in Jefferson, Kentucky, United States, at the age of 81.

fr.lifeSummary: Georg Konrad Tresenriter est né en 1750, à Pfalz, Bayern, Allemagne, fils de Conrad Tresenreuter et Anna Elisabetha. Il a épousé Susannah Margaretha Jacobin à Barbelroth, Landkreis Bergzabern, Bayern, Allemagne. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 4 filles. Il est décédé en 1831, à Jefferson, Kentucky, États-Unis, à l’âge de 81 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Georg Konrad Tresenriter wurde 1750 in Pfalz, Bayern, Deutschland, als Sohn von Conrad Tresenreuter und Anna Elisabetha geboren. Er hat in Barbelroth, Landkreis Bergzabern, Bayern, Deutschland Susannah Margaretha Jacobin geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Er starb 1831 im Alter von 81 Jahren in Jefferson, Kentucky, Vereinigte Staaten.

it.lifeSummary: Georg Konrad Tresenriter è nato il nel 1750 nel Pfalz, Bayern, Germania come figlio di Conrad Tresenreuter e Anna Elisabetha. Lui sposato Susannah Margaretha Jacobin nel Barbelroth, Landkreis Bergzabern, Bayern, Germania. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 4 figlie. Morì nel 1831, nel Jefferson, Kentucky, Stati Uniti d'America, all'età di 81 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Georg Konrad Tresenriterは1750年にドイツバイエルンプファルズでConrad TresenreuterとAnna Elisabethaの息子として生まれた。ドイツバイエルンランドクレイス バーグザバーンバーベルロスでSusannah Margaretha Jacobinと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼は1831年にアメリカ合衆国ケンタッキー州ジェフエルソンで81歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Georg Konrad Tresenriter(은)는 1750년 독일 베이른 p팔즈에서 Conrad Tresenreuter(와)과 Anna Elisabetha의 아들로 태어났다. 그는 독일 베이른 랜드크레이스 버그자버 바브로스에서 Susannah Margaretha Jacobin(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1831년 미국 켄터키 주 제퍼슨에서 81세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Georg Konrad Tresenriter родился в 1750 г. в местности пфалз, беиирн, Германия. Его родителей звали Conrad Tresenreuter и Anna Elisabetha. Он женился на женщине по имени Susannah Margaretha Jacobin в местности барбелрот, ландкрис биргзабирн, беиирн, Германия. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 4 дочери. Он умер в 1831 г. в местности джеффирсон, Кентукки, Соединенные штаты в возрасте 81 год.
